creator: ygy@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Naram Qashat from comment #2)

While I understand that updating as per bug #242347 might solve this for now, this leads me to question if the current MASTER_SITE is guaranteed to keep the old version - could switching to Sourceforge [1] be a better option here?

[1]: https://sourceforge.net/projects/doxygen/files/
